Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon roundup of the best new j=
ournalism on Puck.

llar Sunday Ticket penalty facing the NFL, an antitrust reckoning that coul=

celerate the crack-up of linear TV.

th an =E2=80=9Cinvestment mindset=E2=80=9D seems to have choked off the mar=
ket=E2=80=94and what happens if everyone decides to head for the exits all
at once.
